vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #738

plan.title: feat(skills,interview): IP/legal risk flagging during research/interview phase for projects built on third-party IP

narratives.Description: feat(skills,interview): IP/legal risk flagging during research/interview phase for projects built on third-party IP
narratives.Problem: Deft has no surface that prompts users about IP risk, monetization intent, or legal protection when building on established third-party IP (games, music, film, characters, sports leagues). Playtester (#151) built a Magic: The Gathering deck-builder app through full PRD + SPECIFICATION approval without deft ever flagging WotC copyright, recommending disclaimers, or suggesting a lawyer.
narratives.Acceptance: Add an IP-detection step in research/interview skills using a permissive heuristic (recognizable IP names, fictional-universe terms, branded characters, sports leagues, trademarked products). When IP is detected: ask explicit monetization-intent question (personal vs commercial); emit a plain-English risk summary; recommend lawyer consultation for commercial IP-adjacent projects (non-optional); inject scope items into SPECIFICATION generation for disclaimer stub, API-only-asset-access policy, hosting policy. Create references/ip-risk.md capturing heuristic + question script + minimum-protection checklist. Tests: detection (positive + negative), commercial vs personal branching, scope-item insertion in spec output.
narratives.OutOfScope: Providing legal advice. Cataloging specific IP holders. Automated trademark/copyright lookup.
narratives.Files: skills/deft-directive-interview/SKILL.md; strategies/research.md; NEW references/ip-risk.md; scripts/spec_render.py or equivalent (scope-item injection); tests/skills/test_ip_risk*.py (new); CHANGELOG.md (append).

items.title: Add IP-detection step to skills/deft-directive-interview/SKILL.md (and strategies/research.md if applicable)
Wire monetization-intent question to fire when IP is detected
Plain-English risk summary in interview output for IP-adjacent projects
Lawyer-consultation recommendation: non-optional output for commercial IP-adjacent
SPECIFICATION generation injects disclaimer / asset-access / hosting protection scope items
NEW references/ip-risk.md: heuristic + question script + minimum-protection checklist
Tests: detection (positive + negative), commercial vs personal branching, scope-item insertion
CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] entry under Added referencing #738 (and #151 umbrella)
